event_comments:
Lost and Found: There were a lot of items left over from the meet today. If you think you lost an item, email info@cascadeoc.org and we’ll try to re-unite you with your items.
“Missing Punch” / MSP results: We had one control box malfunction during the event due to the interior getting waterlogged – it was box 117 on HS JV (male and female) and Long Advanced courses. If you missed only this control, then your result is considered valid, and the results below reflect this edit. Any results marked “msp” below missed a control other than 117.
Kudos to those of you who punched your map. Always be sure the control box matches the number you’re looking for, and that it beeps when you insert your e-punch. If it does not beep, find the plastic pin punch hanging with the flag and punch your map to prove you visited the location. (Today we are giving everyone credit even if you didn’t know to use the pin punch, but this may not always be the case!)

Lost and Found: There were a lot of items left over from the meet today. If you think you lost an item, email info@cascadeoc.org and we’ll try to re-unite you with your items.
“Missing Punch” / MSP results: We had one control box malfunction during the event due to the interior getting waterlogged – it was box 117 on HS JV (male and female) and Long Advanced courses. If you missed only this control, then your result is considered valid, and the results below reflect this edit. Any results marked “msp” below missed a control other than 117.
Kudos to those of you who punched your map. Always be sure the control box matches the number you’re looking for, and that it beeps when you insert your e-punch. If it does not beep, find the plastic pin punch hanging with the flag and punch your map to prove you visited the location. (Today we are giving everyone credit even if you didn’t know to use the pin punch, but this may not always be the case!)
